verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Shalom shalom Jerusalem Peace be to you When Messiah comes To take us home May His praise be found in you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Pray for peace Jerusalem City of our God There salvation was Poured out for you The atoning of the Lord Once your streets filled with joy Branches raised up high Shouting blessed be the Holy One Yeshua T'Adonai

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Israel beloved Ephraim my son How my heart would Thril to hear you say The Messiah has come O my brothers hear these words May they pierce your soul Turn again to worship Adonai Messiah you will bow
